titleEn: Kiess officially named the head of the NCSU Prestage Department of Poultry Science
titleZh: NCSU家禽科学系正式任命新主任
summaryZh: 北卡罗来纳州立大学Prestage家禽科学系正式任命Aaron Kiess为系主任，此前他曾担任临时主任。该新闻主要涉及人事变动，未提及任何智慧畜牧相关技术（如IoT、AI、自动化、机器人或传感器）在养殖业中的应用。对于关注智慧畜牧技术的读者，该内容缺乏直接关联和技术价值。
featuredReason: 该新闻仅涉及学术机构人事任命，与智慧畜牧核心技术（物联网、AI、自动化等）无直接关联，不建议智慧畜牧行业人士投入时间阅读。
contentHtml:
RALEIGH, N.C. — At the beginning of the year, North Carolina State University’s Prestage Department of Poultry Science named Aaron Kiess its interim department head after the previous department head, […]
The post Kiess officially named the head of the NCSU Prestage Department of Poultry Science first appeared on poultrytimes.com.
